title: SQL Mission 7: Replace IN Subquery With JOINed Aggregate

initialState.content:
-- Mission 7 Guidelines
-- Build aggregated order counts per customer
-- Keep total_orders > 5
-- Join back to customers

SELECT
  c.customer_id,
  c.name,
  oc.total_orders
FROM customers c
INNER JOIN (
  -- TODO grouped subquery
) oc
  ON c.customer_id = oc.customer_id
ORDER BY oc.total_orders DESC;

rules: must_include:inner join (select customer_id, count(*) as total_orders from orders group by customer_id having count(*) > 5) oc
